topPlaces.name: Mela Ilandaikulam
topPlaces.description: Mela Ilandaikulam a village in Manur taluk, Tirunelveli district, Tamil Nadu state, India. It is situated west of National Highway 7 between Kayathar and Devarkulam, 6 km from Devarkulam and 09 km from Kayathar.

topPlaces.name: Devarkulam
topPlaces.description: Devarkulam or Thevarkulam is a small town in Manur taluk, Tirunelveli district, Tamil Nadu State, India. It is situated along State highway 41 (SH-41) between Tirunelveli and Sankarankovil on the Road.

topPlaces.name: Kavathar
topPlaces.description: Kavathar is a village located in Mangalore Taluk in the northernmost part of Dakshina Kannada, close to the small town of Balkunje. Its postal code is 574154.

items.note: Mela Ilandaikulam a village in Manur taluk, Tirunelveli district, Tamil Nadu state, India. It is situated west of National Highway 7 between Kayathar and Devarkulam, 6 km from Devarkulam and 09 km from Kayathar.

Devarkulam or Thevarkulam is a small town in Manur taluk, Tirunelveli district, Tamil Nadu State, India. It is situated along State highway 41 (SH-41) between Tirunelveli and Sankarankovil on the Road.
Kavathar is a village located in Mangalore Taluk in the northernmost part of Dakshina Kannada, close to the small town of Balkunje. Its postal code is 574154.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Saint Paul Church, Mela Ilandaikulam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Saint Paul Church, Mela Ilandaikulam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Saint Paul Church, Mela Ilandaikulam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (98 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (95 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Saint Paul Church, Mela Ilandaikulam?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Saint Paul Church, Mela Ilandaikulam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Saint Paul Church, Mela Ilandaikulam?
faq.a: Stays in Saint Paul Church, Mela Ilandaikulam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Saint Paul Church, Mela Ilandaikulam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mela Ilandaikulam, Devarkulam, Kavathar.
